summary: DHH announces that registration is open for RailsConf Europe 2007 in Berlin. He expresses excitement about visiting Berlin for the first time while connecting with the European Rails community. He reflects positively on the previous year's London conference, noting it allowed for more in-depth discussions than the US version. The post serves as a straightforward promotional announcement encouraging attendance.
key_points: RailsConf Europe 2007 will be held September 17-19 in Berlin with early bird pricing of €645
DHH found the European conference more conducive to meaningful discussions than the larger US version
The previous year's London event served as a venue for premiering new Rails features
money_quotes: There was somehow more time to get into more discussions with people than the more hectic version in the US.
key_insight: The European Rails conference offered a more intimate, discussion-friendly alternative to the larger US event.
